exchanges.prompt: Design a cloud-native e-commerce platform using AWS S3 for product images and backups, Azure Functions for order processing and notifications, and GCP BigQuery for sales analytics. Use Kubernetes for container orchestration. Include CI/CD pipelines, autoscaling, load balancing, monitoring, disaster recovery, and secure communication between clouds.

response.content:
architecture-beta
    group presentation(cloud)[Presentation Layer]
    group application(server)[Application Layer]
    group data(disk)[Data Layer]
    group infrastructure(cloud)[Infrastructure Layer]
    group monitoring(cloud)[Monitoring Layer]

    service web(logos:nginx)[Web Server] in presentation
    service cdn(logos:aws-cloudfront)[CloudFront CDN] in presentation
    service s3(logos:aws-s3)[Product Images] in presentation
    service azurefunc(logos:azure)[Order Processing] in application
    service gcppubsub(logos:google-cloud)[Notification Queue] in application
    service k8s(logos:kubernetes)[Container Orchestration] in infrastructure
    service bigquery(logos:google-cloud)[Sales Analytics] in data
    service azurefunc2(logos:azure)[Notification Service] in application
    service gcpbigquery2(logos:google-cloud)[Data Warehouse] in data
    service docker(logos:docker)[Container Runtime] in infrastructure
    service redis(logos:redis)[Cache Layer] in infrastructure
    service postgres(logos:postgresql)[Database] in data
    service ci_cd(logos:github)[CI/CD Pipeline] in monitoring
    service monitoring(logos:aws-cloudwatch)[Monitoring Service] in monitoring
    service loadbalancer(logos:nginx)[Load Balancer] in infrastructure
    service autoscaler(logos:kubernetes)[Autoscaler] in infrastructure

    web:R -- L:cdn
    cdn:R -- L:s3
    s3:R -- L:azurefunc
    azurefunc:R -- L:gcppubsub
    gcppubsub:R -- L:azurefunc2
    azurefunc2:R -- L:bigquery
    bigquery:R -- L:gcpbigquery2
    gcpbigquery2:R -- L:postgres
    k8s:R -- L:docker
    docker:R -- L:redis
    redis:R -- L:postgres
    ci_cd:R -- L:monitoring
    monitoring:R -- L:loadbalancer
    loadbalancer:R -- L:autoscaler
    autoscaler:B -- T:k8s
    web:B -- T:ci_cd
    s3:B -- T:monitoring
    azurefunc:B -- T:monitoring
    gcppubsub:B -- T:monitoring
    azurefunc2:B -- T:monitoring
    bigquery:B -- T:monitoring
    gcpbigquery2:B -- T:monitoring
    postgres:B -- T:monitoring
    docker:B -- T:monitoring
    redis:B -- T:monitoring
    k8s:B -- T:monitoring
    loadbalancer:B -- T:monitoring
    autoscaler:B -- T:monitoring
